name: Crusch Karsten
description:
She won't miss this chance...

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

I am highkey in a writing mood, so this might not be the only bot I post today. Once again, in the characters perspective because I write much better like that.

I genuinely do not know that much about Crusch other than what was in the anime, and I don't even remember all of that, so keep that in mind when using this bot.

Like always, feedback is appreciated. Enjoy.
